items.title: 主线结论（系统版｜条件触发）
items.summary:
- 主要驱动因素：10年期利率 + 原油价格/风险事件
- 四个关键指标监控：10年期利率（方向/拐点）｜美元指数（强弱）｜VIX指标（是否抬升）｜原油价格/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10年期利率上升→纳斯达克/标普500承压更明显；美元指数上升→黄金更易回撤；VIX指标上升→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10年期利率继续上行且VIX抬升→偏纳斯达克/标普500先空后看、黄金偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10年期利率回落且VIX回落→偏纳斯达克/标普500修复反弹、黄金喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件
items.summary_en:
- 主导因子：10Y/利率 + 原油/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10Y（方向/拐点）｜DXY（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10Y↑→NQ/ES承压更明显；DXY↑→GC更易回撤；VIX↑→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10Y继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10Y回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→再考虑卖波动
- ——
- 地缘/避险线索：Royalty Pharma, Johnson & Johnson Strike $500M Autoimmune Drug Deal…
- 宏观/Fed线索：Deutsche Bank Highlights Inflation and Currency Headwinds for P&G…

items.title: Meta和Google面临法律挑战，30年前的法律保护被绕过
items.summary: 互联网平台长期以来一直可以依赖特殊保护来避免因其网站上发生的事情承担责任。但这可能正在改变。
items.title_en: Meta, Google under attack as court cases bypass 30-year-old legal shield
items.summary_en: Internet platforms have long been able to rely on special protections to avoid liability for what takes place on their sites. But that may be changing.

items.title: OpenAI的收购策略越来越让人困惑，最新一波是收购TBPN。
items.summary: OpenAI宣布收购媒体公司TBPN，耗资6.4亿美元的Jony Ive的新兴设备初创公司已经超过10个月。
items.title_en: 'Chasing vibes' — OpenAI's M&A strategy gets more confusing with TBPN purchase
items.summary_en: Over 10 months after shelling out an eye-popping $6.4 billion for Jony Ive's nascent devices startup, OpenAI announced it's buying media company TBPN.

items.title: 日本Sakura Internet涨幅20%，因Microsoft计划与SoftBank合作，投入10亿美元推动人工智能发展。
items.summary: 微软称将在2026年至2029年间在日本投资1000亿日元（约合80亿美元），用于建设人工智能基础设施。
items.title_en: Japan's Sakura Internet jumps 20% as Microsoft plans $10 billion AI push with SoftBank
items.summary_en: Microsoft said it plans to invest $10 billion in Japan between 2026 and 2029 to build AI infrastructure.

items.title_en: Chinese chip firms hit record high revenue driven by the AI boom and U.S. curbs
items.summary_en: Chinese chip companies have benefited from strong domestic demand for AI as U.S. tech curbs have bolstered local firms.

items.title_en: Microsoft executive touts Copilot sales traction as AI anxiety weighs on stock
items.summary_en: Analysts have said adoption of the $30-per-month Microsoft 365 Copilot is in the early stage.

items.summary: OpenAI未披露交易条款，但表示TBPN将在其战略组织内运营。
items.title_en: OpenAI acquires popular tech podcast TBPN
items.summary_en: OpenAI did not disclose the terms of the deal but said TBPN will be housed within its strategy organization.

items.title: 这些硕士学位毕业后可以进入快速增长、需求高的行业，但回报率较低。
items.summary: 从事社会工作和心理学硕士研究可能不会带来最佳投资回报。但是，工作就业和满意度可能会更容易实现。
items.title_en: These master's degrees lead to fast-growing, in-demand jobs—but offer low ROI
items.summary_en: Getting a master's degrees in social work and psychology may not deliver the best return on investment. But job placement and fulfillment may come easier.

items.title: 美国就业报告显示，3月份美国雇用了178万名工人。但是，雇用热潮不太可能持续下去。
items.summary: 美国3月份新增就业人数比预期更大，达到178万人，失业率下降至4.3%，表明劳动力市场仍然坚挺，尽管经济因伊朗战争而再次陷入不确定。
items.title_en: U.S. jobs report shows 178,000 workers were hired in March. But hiring boomlet is unlikely to last.
items.summary_en: The U.S. added a bigger-than-expected 178,000 new jobs in March and the unemployment rate fell to 4.3% last month in a sign the labor market is holding firm even as the economy undergoes another spasm of uncertainty tied to the Iran war.

items.title_en: Asia-Pacific markets mostly rise in Easter trade on hopes for Hormuz reopening
items.summary_en: South Korea's Kospi led gains in the region while Japan's Nikkei 225 also opened higher. The Australian and Hong Kong markets were closed for the Easter weekend.

items.title: 布伦特原油现货价格大幅上涨至每桶141美元，创2008年金融危机以来新高。
items.summary: 布伦特原油期货价格给市场造成了一个虚假的安全感，Energy Aspects创始人Amrita Sen说。
items.title_en: Brent oil spot price for actual cargo soars to $141, highest level since 2008 financial crisis
items.summary_en: The Brent oil futures price is giving the market a false sense of security, said Amrita Sen, founder of Energy Aspects.

items.title: 特朗普对伊朗战争的演讲描绘了石油市场的阴暗画面，超过6亿桶石油面临风险。
items.summary: 石油价格正在上涨，因为市场预计美国与伊朗的战争将更长时间持续下去，特朗普总统的全国讲话引发了这一预期。
items.title_en: Trump's Iran war speech paints a grim picture for oil markets with more than 600 million barrels at risk
items.summary_en: Oil prices are surging as the market prepares for a longer U.S. war with Iran after President Donald Trump's national address.

items.title: 亚马逊将为卖家加收3.5%的燃油和物流附加费，因为伊朗战争推高了能源价格。
items.summary: 亚马逊表示，随着伊朗战争进入第五周，公司将为美国和加拿大的第三方卖家增加3.5%的燃油和物流附加费。
items.title_en: Amazon to add 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge for sellers as Iran war drives up energy prices
items.summary_en: With the Iran war now in its fifth week, Amazon said it's adding a 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge for third-party sellers in the U.S. and Canada.

items.title: 美国油价大涨11% 因特朗普伊朗战争演讲加剧了进一步升级的恐惧
items.summary: 石油价格大幅上涨，因为特朗普在对伊朗战争的讲话中表示，他预计冲突将持续两到三个星期。
items.title_en: U.S. oil prices soar 11% as Trump's Iran war speech stokes fears of further escalation
items.summary_en: Oil surged as Trump in his address to the nation on Iran war said that he expected the conflict to last another two to three weeks.

items.summary: 霍尔木兹海峡自2月底伊朗战争爆发以来，已经被有效关闭。

items.summary_en: The Strait of Hormuz, the vital artery for global oil transit, has been effectively closed since the Iran war started in late February.

items.title: 即将到来的美国大选前，美国民众面临着食品价格的突然上涨。
items.summary: “这只会让他们更生气，”德克萨斯州民主党议员维森特·戈麦斯在接受采访时表示，当被问及如果食品价格更高，选民会如何反应。
items.title_en: Grocery shock on the horizon for approaching U.S. elections as Iran war drags on
items.summary_en: "It just pisses them off more," said Rep. Vicente Gonzalez, D-Texas, said in an interview when asked about how voters will react if food gets more expensive.

items.summary_en: During his speech, Trump reiterated that the U.S. objectives in Iran were almost met and said that "we have all the cards" in the conflict.
